mapper.sql: id, name, id_card, gender, birth_date, age, phone, address, health_status, disability_level, living_alone, family_contact, family_phone, special_needs, care_level, photo_url, status, family_user_id, audit_status, audit_time, audit_by, audit_remark, created_by, created_time, updated_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO elderly_info ( name, id_card, gender, birth_date, age, phone, address, health_status, disability_level, living_alone, family_contact, family_phone, special_needs, care_level, photo_url, status, family_user_id, audit_status, created_by, created_time ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{idCard}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{age}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{healthStatus}, #{disabilityLevel}, #{livingAlone}, #{familyContact}, #{familyPhone}, #{specialNeeds}, #{careLevel}, #{photoUrl}, #{status}, #{familyUserId}, #{auditStatus}, #{createdBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE elderly_info SET name = #{name}, id_card = #{idCard}, gender = #{gender}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, age = #{age}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, health_status = #{healthStatus}, disability_level = #{disabilityLevel}, living_alone = #{livingAlone}, family_contact = #{familyContact}, family_phone = #{familyPhone}, special_needs = #{specialNeeds}, care_level = #{careLevel}, photo_url = #{photoUrl}, status = #{status}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM elderly_info WHERE id_card = #{idCard} AND status = 1
AND id != #{excludeId}
SELECT care_level AS type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM elderly_info WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY care_level
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM elderly_info WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM elderly_info WHERE status = 0
SELECT FROM elderly_info WHERE family_user_id = #{familyUserId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM elderly_info WHERE family_user_id = #{familyUserId} AND status = 1 AND audit_status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM elderly_info WHERE audit_status = 'PENDING' AND status = 1 ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM elderly_info WHERE audit_status = 'PENDING' AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE elderly_info SET audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_time = NOW(), audit_by = #{auditBy}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM elderly_info WHERE family_user_id = #{familyUserId} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM elderly_info WHERE family_user_id = #{familyUserId} AND status = 1 AND audit_status = 'APPROVED'
SELECT FROM elderly_info WHERE status = 1 AND audit_status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY name ASC
